1_hypothesis.note: Economic-only prose -> refined spec. Parity A: spec EMERGED to a full match of the consensus reference (M1 75/25 skew corner, M2 IV x RR, M3 stall/divergence; freshness 3, sigma 1.0; earnings + short-trend ON, VIX off).

2_pre_critic.note: PASS with warnings: narrow-corner fragility, M3 exhaustion look-ahead, long-side survivorship/HTB, cost realism, 75/25 threshold non-stationarity.

3_code.note: Coder generated quarantined generated/strategy_skew_modeA.py from the spec; 100% fire-side fidelity vs compute_consensus (0 disagreements); reproduced the Mode-B verdict. Reference module untouched.

4_backtest.note: Mode-A fires-frame backtest ADAPTER (quant_validator.backtest) closes the plumbing: wraps signal_vs_random.run_test (single eligibility screen — de-dup) and emits canonical results/ (returns, positions, vs_random, net_return_panel). 454,798 fires, 2013-2026, survivorship-free. WARM-UP: first fire = panel start + 756 bdays (3yr ORATS, 2013-11-26); standardized from the ad-hoc 252/504 so every percentile/sigma window is fully warmed (dropped ~20.6k 2012+early-2013 fires).

5_stats.note: Stats CLI reads the adapter's results/returns.csv. Strategy Sharpe 0.98 (walk-forward fold-mean 1.31, 1 negative fold); Deflated Sharpe p-value 0.006, prob-real 0.994 (edge survives deflation for n_trials=3).

6_vs_random.note: PRIMARY (>=2018) is the CANONICAL verdict (the deployment regime; drives the gate stack); the pre-2018 OOS is the held-out confirmation; the full-window figure is the all-data reference / sizing basis. Date/direction-matched random pool, total-return, survivorship-free.

7_validator.note: Critic-validator 9-criteria + placebo from the prior validation (critique_post.json) now backed by present results/. Standing items are the pre-critic warnings (narrow-corner fragility, long-side survivorship/HTB).

8_gates.note: All gates PASS on the adapter's artifacts: deflated_sharpe (DSR p=0.006 < 0.95, prob-real 0.994), correlation (no survivors), pca (single-asset N/A), vs_random (fires-adapter verdict). first_failure null; missing-input now reports not_available, not a spurious fail.

9_risk.note: Fractional portfolio Kelly lambda=0.25, constant-corr Sigma (rho 0.30), caps per-name 5% / gross 1.0 / net 0.5; drawdown kill-switch -15%/-7%/x0.30 (NON-binding at lambda=0.25 — sizing alone survives; proven in a full-Kelly stress, maxDD -49.6%->-27.4%). Risk Agent: 4/10 -> DEPLOY at 0.5x.

10_memory.note: Trial recorded. Decision: ACCEPT (validated + sized) -> deploy 0.5x; paper phase pending. Residual: 2020 selection miss accepted (no robust gate).

cost.note: Equity round-trip breakeven; 5d dies (<20 bps), 21d has a big cushion. Edge (vs random) is cost-invariant; absolute profitability is the binding constraint.

temporal.note: regime-concentrated — flagged years [2016, 2017, 2020, 2022, 2026]; 2020 inverts (-41.9 bps, z -5.06); 12/14 years positive. 756-bday warm-up drops 2012; 2013 partial (Nov-Dec).

regime.note: ACCEPT + size-to-survive + drawdown kill-switch; NO ex-ante regime entry gate (n=1; the tested vol gate BACKFIRED — worsened 2020 and discarded +294 bps/trade of profit).

4_paper.note: Alpaca PAPER (alpaca_paper, tif=OPG): 3 targets, 3 accepted, 0/1 short fires skipped non-shortable; equity $1000000.0; shortability coverage 53.3% (14/30 short names non-shortable); ~21-bday scheduled exits; no-flip-without-close. OOS vs sized backtest: warming up (0 sessions). Phase-5 live = same path, paper=False + live keys.

kill_switch.note: rolling peak-to-current drawdown from account equity

live_orats.source: live daily full-universe ORATS pull (adapters.orats live)
live_orats.note: Live ORATS feed wired: backfilled to 2026-05-22, signal recomputed on the trailing 756-bday window -> 215 fires (110 long / 105 short) on 2026-05-22. Feed verified; submission NOT yet wired to the live panel (next step).

mutations.verdict: NO VALIDATED IMPROVEMENT — v22+exits is near a local optimum

deployed_policy.entry: v22 consensus (M1 skew corner AND M2 IVxRR AND M3 stall/divergence; 75/25, freshness 3, sigma 1.0) - thesis-locked, unchanged
deployed_policy.exit: hard_stop_8 + boll_reversion_band + 21D backstop (6b OOS-validated, sign-aware) - replaces mechanical-21D-only
deployed_policy.enforce_exits: risk_only (default): hard_stop_8 + 21D backstop + kill-switch enforced automatically; boll_reversion profit-target surfaced as advisory (opt in via enforced)
deployed_policy.benefit: the validated exits mainly reduce DRAWDOWN / TAIL (esp. 2021-01 meme squeeze: hard_stop cuts the book-month ~+516bps), NOT extra return - mean per-trade edge is similar or slightly lower. Banked for risk, not alpha.
deployed_policy.mutation_verdict: Mutation Agent (#11): no validated improvement beyond v22+exits (near a local optimum) net of the cumulative MT penalty.
